name: hehe
short_description: this game is 2d platform survivor game. Once upon a time, there was a small sugar cube, onece they were playing a game with their friends, they were attacked by the tea monster! and the tea monster threw all sugar cubes into it, only our sugar survived (drink your tea without sugar)
detailed_description:
this game is a 2d platform game. It is a game where the player escapes from red walls by using special powers.
a - right
d - left
space - jump
mause - abilities.

Once upon a time, there was a small sugar cube, onece they were playing a game with their friends, they were attacked by the tea monster! and the tea monster threw all sugar cubes into it, only our sugar survived (drink your tea without sugar)

Add to Wishlist for beta testing
